Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}Is something the matter, Amada-kun? Everyone's heading back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 52 -1 0 0}Sorry, I got distracted. There's just a lot on my mind...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}Yeah, I know. It's a lot to take in, but you don't have to think so hard about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}All we can do is keep exploring, so let's just focus on the road ahead of us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}I know how you feel, but... All we can do is focus on exploring.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}We don't have any other choice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}I mean, this place is a reflection of our own minds, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}Something tells me that it's going to take more than just exploration to get out of here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}I want to understand why all of this is happening. How did we end up here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7057 0 0}Sorry, I didn't mean for it to sound like you were in the wrong![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}Nah, don't worry about it. Honestly, you made a really good point.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}Anyway, we're a team, right? It's important for us to speak our minds like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I'm not very good at it, though. I have a bad habit of keeping things like this bottled up...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I didn't have anyone I could talk to before, but... It's different now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7040 0 0}I have to remember—I'm not alone anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}Thank you, Yukari-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}I didn't even do anything, though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}I wouldn't say that! I actually feel a lot better after talking to you. Anyway, I'll head back now and prep for our next trip.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}I'm not alone, either. I know that, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}All this time, I've been hurting inside...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}...I better head back. There's no time to dwell on this right now.[n]{f 1 1}
